title: Rhetinantha schistostele
taxonomy: Rhetinantha schistostele is classified within the plant kingdom as an orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids native to South America. The genus Rhetinantha is part of the subtribe Cymbidiinae within the tribe Vandeae. Rhetinantha schistostele is also known to be a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants without harming them. Further classification of Rhetinantha schistostele within its scientific name includes being part of the subgenus Rhetinantha.
